response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong technical breadth and developer tools experience, the resume lacks any evidence of people management—a core requirement for this Level II Manager role. His career shows a consistent pattern of senior individual contributor positions rather than team leadership. Without demonstrated experience leading teams, hiring, conducting performance reviews, or developing direct reports, he does not meet the minimum qualifications for a full-time people-leadership position.
strengths: Extensive technical depth across multiple languages (TypeScript, DLang, C++, Swift) and domains (web, mobile, embedded, GIS)
Direct hands-on experience with developer tools and CI/CD infrastructure (GitLab, Docker, Artifactory, deployment automation)
Active open-source contributor and mentor through GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, and workshop leadership
concerns: No demonstrated people management experience—no mention of hiring, team leadership, performance reviews, or managing direct reports
Developer tools experience limited to ~2 years (Altom 2016-2018), below the required 3-year minimum
Career trajectory is senior IC, not leader—no evidence of strategic planning, roadmap ownership, or organizational change leadership
